title: Omlaut
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:Omlout.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Maarek Stele inspects shuttle ''Omlaut''.]]
'''''Omlaut''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]] that belonged to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and which carried a high-ranking Rebel [[Commander/Legends|commander]], who was to meet with [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]] aboard the latter's [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Protector'']]. They were to discuss how Harkov would serve the cause of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] in order for him to be further rewarded. However, before the shuttle arrived on Harkov's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], Imperial loyalist [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] inspected the shuttle and discovered its passenger. This set one of the initial stages for the eventual battle between the Empire and [[Treason/Legends|treasonous]] forces led by Admiral Harkov.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
